name: BOM tab is hidden for a non-Assembly part
steps:
Given a part 'Resistor 10k' is not marked as 'Assembly'
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'Resistor 10k'
Then the 'BOM' tab is not visible in the tab bar

name: BOM tab is visible only for Assembly parts
steps:
Given a part 'PCB Assembly' is marked as 'Assembly' and has 3 BOM line items
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'PCB Assembly'
Then the 'BOM' tab is visible and shows a table with 3 rows of sub-component parts
